# Machtblick

> Public German politics data made readable. Machtblick helps people inspect Bundestag votes, members, speeches, motions, and parliamentary groups.

Machtblick is a public-interest project built from open German datasets. The Bundestag app is prerendered HTML with canonical URLs, a sitemap, and linked JSON data. Main content is German. English pages live under `/en/`.

## Best Entry Points

- [Sitemap](https://machtblick.de/sitemap.xml): Complete list of prerendered public URLs.
- [Votes](https://machtblick.de/votes/): Bundestag votes with sponsor, date, result, party positions, and linked documents.
- [Members](https://machtblick.de/members/): Bundestag members with party, state, attendance, vote behavior, speeches, and motions.
- [Speeches](https://machtblick.de/speeches/): Searchable Bundestag speeches.
- [Parties](https://machtblick.de/parties/): Parliamentary groups with seats, cohesion, proposals, members, and voting alignment.

## English Entry Points

- [Votes](https://machtblick.de/en/votes/)
- [Members](https://machtblick.de/en/members/)
- [Speeches](https://machtblick.de/en/speeches/)
- [Parties](https://machtblick.de/en/parties/)

## URL Structure

- `/votes/`: Vote list, showing roll-call (`namentlich`) votes by default, optionally filtered with `?party=`, `?type=` (`namentlich` or `handzeichen` or `hammelsprung`), and `?result=` (`angenommen` or `abgelehnt`).
- `/votes/{id}/`: Vote detail with party voting, deviating members, result, sponsor, speeches, related motions, and source documents.
- `/motions/{id}/`: Motion or bill detail with summary, status, print document, signatories, and linked votes.
- `/members/`: Member list, optionally filtered with `?party=` and `?state=`.
- `/members/{slug}/votes/`: Canonical member detail with voting record, attendance, speeches, and motions.
- `/members/{slug}/speeches/` and `/members/{slug}/motions/`: Member detail tabs that canonicalize to the voting record.
- `/parties/`: Parliamentary group overview.
- `/parties/{slug}/profile/`: Canonical party detail with profile, votes, history, proposals, members, cohesion, and alignment.
- `/parties/{slug}/votes/` and `/parties/{slug}/history/`: Party detail tabs that canonicalize to the profile.
- English equivalents use `/en/` before the path.

## JSON Data

- `/api/votes.json`: Lean vote index.
- `/api/members.json`: Lean member index.
- `/api/parties.json`: Lean party index.
- `/votes/{id}.json`: Full vote detail.
- `/members/{slug}.json`: Full member detail.
- `/parties/{slug}.json`: Full party detail.
- `/motions/{id}.json`: Full German motion detail.
- `/en/motions/{id}.json`: Full English motion detail.

## Data Sources

- Deutscher Bundestag open data.
- DIP Bundestag documents.
- abgeordnetenwatch member and term data.

## AI And Search Access

- `robots.txt` allows public indexing, search, retrieval, and user-requested AI access, including OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, Claude-User, Claude-SearchBot, Googlebot, Bingbot, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, and Applebot.
- Training crawlers such as GPTBot, ClaudeBot, Google-Extended, Applebot-Extended, and CCBot are not granted access.
- `Content-Signal` declares search and AI input access, with AI training permission not granted.
- Pages expose canonical URLs, Open Graph metadata, X card metadata, structured data, and JSON alternates where available.
- Prefer canonical page URLs for citation. Prefer JSON endpoints for exact vote, member, party, or motion fields.
